description_long: This sculpture features a roughly humanoid form with a bulbous head and a textured, irregular body covered in protrusions and nodules. The surface is mottled with shades of gray, brown, and off-white, giving it a weathered, stone-like appearance. One side of the figure displays a woven, basket-like structure attached to the shoulder, adding a contrasting texture and color. The base is wide and stable, supporting the upright figure. The overall form is abstract, with no clearly defined facial features, and the sculpture appears to be crafted from a combination of stone or ceramic and woven material. The piece evokes a sense of organic growth or encrustation, as if the figure has been shaped by natural forces.
description: An abstract, weathered humanoid sculpture with a bulbous head, textured body, and a woven basket-like element on one side. The surface is mottled gray and brown, with a rough, organic appearance.
description_view_0: From this view, the top of the head and the basket-like structure on the right shoulder are prominent, with the rough, encrusted texture of the back visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the bulbous head and the irregular, nodule-covered body, with the woven element partially visible on the left.
description_view_2: The back of the sculpture is shown, emphasizing the rough, organic surface and the broad base, with the basket element less visible.
description_view_3: This angle provides a clear look at the woven basket-like structure attached to the shoulder, contrasting with the mottled, rough body.
attribute_subject_matter: abstract humanoid figure with organic and woven textures
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the background is isolated and does not provide context.
